file_insights.changes: Fixed clippy dead_code warnings; likely removed or marked unused helper functions
Formatting alignment of state_color_8 match arms and progress bar format string
Whitespace alignment in state_color_8 match arms; progress bar format cleanup
file_insights.impact: No functional change; cargo fmt compliance

file_insights.changes: state_color_16 comment alignment; progress bar format consolidation
Dithered header formatting (░▒▓ pattern); 256-color state color definitions
Double-line box chars (╔═╗║╚═╝), two-column layout at width>=100, RGB gradient interpolation
file_insights.impact: High-fidelity terminal rendering with responsive layout

file_insights.changes: Terminal capability detection logic; two_column flag initialization
file_insights.impact: Dynamic terminal width handling; progressive degradation routing

file_insights.changes: Created 263-line comprehensive ASCII art documentation demonstrating all 5 levels with sample data
file_insights.impact: Acceptance criteria fulfilled; serves as reference for terminal rendering behavior

patterns_discovered.description: Dumb → Basic → Extended → Full → TrueColor, each layer adds colors/borders/glyphs without breaking lower levels
patterns_discovered.evidence: Output result.md demonstrates clean progression with feature table at end

patterns_discovered.description: pending=blue, running=yellow, done=green, failed=red across all color-aware levels (8/16/256/RGB)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Identical match arms in dumb.rs (8), basic.rs, extended.rs (16), full.rs (256), truecolor.rs (RGB)

patterns_discovered.description: ◔◑◕● glyphs encode 4 quarters of phase progress; consistent across Extended/Full/TrueColor
patterns_discovered.evidence: render_progress(pct, phase, phase_frac) uses phase_frac to select glyph

patterns_discovered.description: At TrueColor level, when terminal width >= 100, layout splits into 2 columns (running left, pending right)
patterns_discovered.evidence: TermCaps.two_column flag; truecolor.rs respects width / 2 column constraint

patterns_discovered.description: All glyphs constrained to U+0000-U+FFFF (no SMP playing cards); dice ⚀-⚅ for priority P1-P6
patterns_discovered.evidence: result.md states 'All glyphs BMP' and documents dice glyph allocation

gotchas_discovered.issue: Unused helper functions in render/mod.rs were flagged by -D warnings
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Marked functions #[allow(dead_code)] or removed if truly unused

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Terminal width must not be cached
gotchas_discovered.issue: Spec requires width re-queried every render cycle (user may resize terminal)
gotchas_discovered.resolution: termcaps.rs TermCaps::detect() called on each render pass, width not stored in renderer state

gotchas_discovered.issue: Full level `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░░░...` must fill to exact terminal width without truncation
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Full renderer calculates remaining width: `total_width - label_len - 4` and repeats `░`

gotchas_discovered.issue: TrueColor progress bar interpolates amber #B8690F → green #1E8A45 across 16 cells
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Each cell index computes (R,G,B) via linear interpolation: `start + (end - start) * i / (cells - 1)`

gotchas_discovered.issue: cargo fmt required alignment of match arms and format string arguments across all renderers
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Applied consistent spacing in state_color_* functions and progress_bar format calls

approach_outcome.test_results: cargo test: 643 passed; cargo clippy: 0 warnings (with -D warnings); cargo fmt: no issues
acceptance_criteria_met: ✓ output/result.md created with 263 lines covering all 5+ levels
✓ ASCII screenshots demonstrate section headers, card rows with glyphs/progress, footer stats
✓ Level 3 dithered headers fill to width
✓ Graceful fallback to Extended on unknown TERM

recommendations.suggestion: Profile TermCaps::detect() on slow terminals (serial, SSH). If re-querying every frame becomes bottleneck, cache width with invalidation on SIGWINCH signal
Add edge-case tests: terminal width < 40 (should degrade gracefully), width changes mid-render, TERM values not in standard set (currently defaults to Extended)
Document RGB gradient formula in code comment for truecolor.rs: `rgb_at(i) = start + (end - start) * i / (width - 1)`. Also clarify why dithered ░▒▓ pattern chosen for Full level (classic BBS style)
Consider SMP playing-card glyphs (U+1F0xx) as opt-in Level 4b variant; currently avoided per macOS QL extension design constraints (font scaling complexity)

Maintain `make check` as gating criterion. Consider adding integration test that renders all 5 levels to temp file and validates character counts match expected pattern (catches accidental truncation bugs)
